name: Data Basics Tutorial
title: Data Basics
description: A beginner-friendly introduction to understanding and visualizing data. Perfect for getting started!

name: Linear Regression
title: Regression Analysis
description: Join SportsBrand's analytics team and discover if Instagram ads really drive website traffic.

name: Multiple Regression
title: Multiple Regression
description: Help Maya optimize CloudTech's marketing budget across 5 channels. Learn how multiple predictors work together and how to interpret their effects.

name: The Choice Lab
title: Binary Choice
description: Help BeatBox Audio launch earbuds by modeling what drives consumer choice. Interactive S-curve explorer and live prediction calculator.

name: The Choice Lab: Evaluation
title: Choice Evaluation
description: Evaluate BeatBox's model with confusion matrices, ROC curves, and extend to multinomial choice with interactive tools.

name: The StreamVerse Lab
title: A/B Testing
description: Join StreamVerse's product team and test whether new thumbnails increase click-through rates. Learn experiment design, chi-square tests, and data-driven decisions.
